overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia traveling through a medieval rural landscape. The character moves from a village with thatched-roof huts along a dirt path, crosses a wooden bridge over a river, and continues through open farmland with haystacks under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village outskirts with thatched huts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the village outskirts, passing seated villagers

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on wooden fence watching the path
villager sitting on the ground by the roadside

entered.detail: medieval peasant hut with straw roof and wooden walls
rough wooden fence lining the dirt path
unpaved dirt trail winding through the village
tall evergreen trees surrounding the village

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a medieval village outskirts with traditional thatched-roof huts and wooden fences lining a dirt path. Geralt walks forward along the trail, passing villagers seated on fences. The environment features moderate vegetation with pine trees in the background under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside approach with wooden bridge crossing

events.description: path opens to reveal river and stone watchtower in the distance
character steps onto wooden bridge and crosses over the water

agents.ego_description: approaching the river and carefully crossing the wooden bridge

entered.detail: calm river flowing alongside the path with reflections
simple wooden plank bridge crossing the river
tall cylindrical stone tower visible across the river

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a riverside environment as the village huts fall behind. The path leads toward a wooden bridge crossing calm river waters, with a stone watchtower visible in the distance. Dense vegetation lines the riverbank as the character crosses the bridge around the 26-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland with haystacks and tall grass meadows

events.description: exits riverside path and enters open fields with scattered haystacks
character transitions from walking to running through the tall grass

agents.ego_description: running through tall grass in the open farmland, navigating around haystacks

entered.detail: conical stack of harvested hay in the field
dense tall grass and wildflowers covering the meadow
white-barked deciduous tree in the meadow

segments.scene_description: Leaving the river behind, the character enters wide-open farmland characterized by tall grass meadows and scattered haystacks. The ground transitions from dirt to grass as the character picks up speed, running through the field. Distant forests and additional thatched structures are visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quaint medieval village into an expansive rural farmland. It begins on the outskirts of a settlement, following Geralt along a dirt path lined with thatched-roof huts and wooden fences. As the village structures fall behind, the path leads toward a riverside environment where the camera crosses a wooden bridge over calm waters with a distant stone watchtower in view. The scene then opens into wide-open meadows of tall grass and scattered haystacks as the terrain shifts from dirt to greenery. Finally, the character picks up speed, running through the fields toward distant forests and isolated structures on the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.
